name: Ollama (Intel GPU)
short_desc: Run large language models locally using your Intel GPU
author: Ollama
description: Ollama lets you run large language models (LLMs) locally on your own hardware. This version is optimized for Intel GPUs (Arc, Iris Xe, integrated graphics) using Intel's oneAPI compute runtime. Mistral is pulled automatically on first start as the default well-rounded model. Supports the OpenAI-compatible API.

form_fields.label: Ollama version tag
form_fields.hint: Docker image tag to use (e.g. latest, 0.3.14). Leave blank for latest.

form_fields.label: Model to auto-pull on first start
form_fields.hint: Pulled automatically on first start. Change or leave blank to skip. Examples: llama3.2:1b, phi3:mini

form_fields.label: Models storage path
form_fields.hint: Host path to persist downloaded models. Defaults to Runtipi app data directory.
